app.title: Truth or Dare
app.subtitle: Professional dark theme
app.description: Create and join game rooms, then play truth or dare with friends.

homePage.headline: Ready for a night of truth, dares, and laughter?
homePage.intro: Truth or Dare is the ultimate party game to break the ice and create unforgettable moments with friends. Select from 5 unique categories, complete hilarious challenges, and track the leaderboard. Host a game in seconds or join an existing room with just a room code.
homePage.summary: Choose a room flow, invite friends, and enjoy an immersive dark theme game experience.
homePage.roomChoiceTitle: You already have a running room
homePage.roomChoiceMessage: Want to join your existing room or create a new one?
homePage.roomChoiceToast: You have a running room. Join it or create a new one.

features.title: Multiplayer fun
features.description: Play with 2+ players in real time with shared scores.

features.title: 5 categories
features.description: Normal, Funny, Friends, Couples, and Spicy modes.

features.title: Scoreboard
features.description: Track scores and crown the party champion.

createRoomPage.heading: Create a room
createRoomPage.description: Start a new game and invite friends with a room code.

joinRoomPage.heading: Join a room
joinRoomPage.description: Enter the room code and your name to join the party.

gameRoomPage.heading: Game room
gameRoomPage.description: Play rounds, choose truths or dares, and track scores together.

roomsPage.heading: All rooms
roomsPage.description: Browse running and ended game rooms.
roomsPage.empty: No rooms yet. Create one to get started.

notFoundPage.title: Page not found
notFoundPage.message: Looks like this room does not exist yet.

auth.description: Sign in with your email or Google account to continue.
auth.exchangeWarning: Failed to exchange id token for backend JWT
auth.providerError: useAuth must be used within AuthProvider
auth.missingCredentials: Firebase credentials are missing. Add them to your environment file.
auth.emailNotFound: No account was found for this email.
auth.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

loginProvider.emailSuccess: Logged in with email and password.
loginProvider.useEmail: This email is registered with email and password. Please login through email.
loginProvider.useGoogle: This email is registered with Google. Please login through Google.

toast.customQuestionSaved: Custom question saved for future rooms.
toast.roomEnded: This room has ended. Please create a new room.

errors.nameMin: Player name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.roomCodeInvalid: Room code must be at least 4 characters.
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.createPlayers: Add at least two named players.
errors.roomNotFound: Room code not found. Try another code.
errors.backendUnavailable: Backend is unavailable. Please try again.
errors.usernameMin: Username must be at least 2 characters.
errors.roomEnded: This room has ended. Please create a new room.

Normal: What is one habit you want to improve this month?
What is a small thing that instantly makes your day better?
What is the last thing you searched online?
What is something you are proud of but rarely mention?
What is one rule you broke as a kid?
What is your most used app right now?
What is a food you will never get bored of?
What is one thing you wish you learned earlier?
Funny: What is the funniest excuse you have ever used?
What is a silly fear you still have?
What is the most embarrassing song you secretly like?
What is the weirdest dream you remember?
What is your funniest autocorrect mistake?
What is something ridiculous you believed as a child?
What is your worst cooking fail?
What would your warning label say?
Friends: What is your favorite memory with this group?
Who here would survive best on a road trip?
What is one thing you admire about the player on your right?
Who is most likely to become famous?
What is one secret talent you have?
What is the kindest thing a friend has done for you?
Who here gives the best advice?
Couples: What is your favorite shared memory?
What small gesture makes you feel cared for?
What was your first impression of your partner?
What date idea would you plan next?
What is a song that reminds you of your partner?
What is something your partner does that makes you smile?
What is one dream you want to build together?
What is your favorite compliment to receive?
Spicy: What is your biggest confidence boost?
What is the boldest compliment you have received?
What is your favorite kind of flirt?
What makes someone instantly attractive to you?
What is your most charming quality?
What is a harmless crush story you can share?
What is your best date-night outfit?
What is a romantic scene you secretly love?

Normal: Speak in a movie trailer voice until your next turn.
Let the group pick a word you cannot say for two rounds.
Balance something safe on your head for ten seconds.
Do your best dance move for fifteen seconds.
Say the alphabet backward as far as you can.
Compliment every player in one sentence.
Funny: Talk like a robot for one minute.
Make the group laugh without using words.
Pretend to host a cooking show for thirty seconds.
Do an impression of a famous person.
Invent a handshake with the player on your left.
Act like you just won an award.
Give a weather report for this room.
Friends: Let another player choose your profile pose.
Swap seats with someone and imitate them kindly for twenty seconds.
Send a wholesome text to a friend not in the room.
Give the group a team name.
Create a two-line chant for the group.
Let the group choose a harmless nickname for you this round.
Do a slow-motion high five with someone.
Draw a quick portrait of another player.
Couples: Give your partner a sincere compliment.
Plan a thirty-second imaginary vacation together.
Hold eye contact for ten seconds.
Let your partner pick your next dare category.
Say three things you appreciate about your partner.
Spicy: Give your best confident walk across the room.
Say a cheesy pickup line with full confidence.
Let the group rate your wink attempt.
Describe your dream date in fifteen seconds.
Send a flirty but respectful compliment to your partner or skip safely.
Give yourself a bold compliment out loud.
